The Ship Inn is up first, with managers James Tindall and Jessica Walton wanting to let off steam about the surprise comments that made their visit a heated affair(n)

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather(n)

programme.title: The Royal House of Windsor
programme.desc: The final episode focuses on heir to the throne Prince Charles and the radically different vision of the monarchy he promised for his own reign. From a young age, Charles was determined to do something important with his position in the royal family, doing so as he set up the Prince's Trust charity to help unfashionable causes, and also weighed in on controversial political issues across the years(n)

programme.title: The Queen's Lost Family
programme.desc: The inside story of the royal family over three turbulent decades from the 1920s to the end of the Second World War. It begins just after the First World War, as monarchies throughout Europe have toppled, and most working men and many women now have the vote(n)

programme.title: Hidden Figures (2016)
programme.desc: As the space race reaches fever pitch in the early 1960s, a trio of female African-American mathematicians attempt to overcome prejudice and find work with NASA. Their remarkable skills prove vital in getting an astronaut into orbit and bringing him safely back to Earth, but to realise their potential they must overcome deep-seated prejudice in the space programme and society as a whole. Fact-based drama, starring Taraji P Henson, Octavia Spencer, Janelle Monae and Kevin Costner(n)

programme.title: X-Men: The Last Stand (2006)
programme.desc: The mutant heroes return to face a battle on three fronts. Arch-enemy Magneto is back with an army of followers, while a corporation has created a drug that permanently robs mutants of their powers. Meanwhile, their former ally Jean Grey has returned from the dead as the destructive and seemingly unstoppable Phoenix. The third instalment of the superhero saga, starring Hugh Jackman, Ian McKellen, Famke Janssen, Halle Berry and Kelsey Grammer(n)

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: An extended edition in which Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker are joined by guests Armando Iannucci, Tom Allen, Guz Khan, Aisling Bea and Geoff Norcott for a comic review of the significant moments of the past seven days as the clock ticks down to the moment Britain leaves the European Union. As usual, the hashtag #isitok paves the way for the gang to round up, examine and explain the leading and most entertaining news stories of the week(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Omnibus. Drug dealer Jordan makes his presence known, unnerving cousin Sid. The Nightingales try to stop Juliet from making a mistake, and Liam puts his plan for Maxine into action(n)

programme.title: The Great Hotel Escape
programme.desc: Adam the builder rushes to finish James and Fjona's hotel renovations in time for their VIP guests to arrive. Steph and Dom catch up with novice hotel owners Francesa and Neal(n)

programme.title: Kirstie's Fill Your House for Free
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp heads to Brighton, where she visits a stunning Georgian property, before going to Devon to see a home where the furniture was made for free(n)

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug's parents come to stay while Carrie is on a business trip, but insist on treating him like a kid. Arthur designs a new type of screwdriver and manufactures thousands of them when a hardware store shows an interest. Comedy, starring Jerry Stiller(n)

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug is pleased when Carrie starts having a drink with her colleagues every evening, because it takes her mind off his new diet. After she falls out with her pals, however, he begins providing her with alcohol at home, hoping he can keep her relaxed behaviour going a little longer. Comedy, guest starring Lou Ferrigno, with Kevin James and Leah Remini(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra complains she and Ray do not have any fun together - and persuades him to let her join him in his game of golf. Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton star(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is hurt to discover Penny and Bernadette went shopping for bridesmaid dresses without her. She first turns to a reluctant Sheldon for comfort and later tries to drown her sorrows. Comedy, starring Mayim Bialik and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny endure an awkward night at the cinema, both insisting the outing is not a date. Meanwhile, a terrified Sheldon enlists his friends' help when a bird flies into his apartment, but his behaviour soon leaves them exasperated. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons(n)

programme.title: Jamie and Jimmy's Friday Night Feast
programme.desc: Claudia Winkleman joins Jamie Oliver and Jimmy Doherty for an evening of good food, great chat and celebrity fun and games. Jamie tracks down perfection from the man who originally invented the Strictly co-host family's favourite dish, butter chicken with fluffy pilau rice and naan bread, speaking to his grandson who is happy to share the original recipe. Jamie also creates a Spanish-inspired Southend paella for them all to tuck into, while Jimmy makes the perfect pork scratchings. The hosts also put a shift in at a fruit-packing plant and learn how to make gin with surplus grapes(n)

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer talk to Oti Mabuse, Sarah Hadland, Youssef Kerkour, Joel Dommett and Todrick Hall, while Tom Grennan performs This Is The Place, live in the studio(n)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa resolves to pursue a career in astronomy, but unfortunately her decision coincides with Chief Wiggum's hare-brained new initiative to reduce crime in Springfield - by illuminating the whole town all night. With the guest voice of Eric Idle(n)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is accused of killing a rare insect and sentenced to deliver meals to the elderly as part of a community service order - only to be suspected of murdering an old woman on his round. With the voice of Carmen Electra(n)

programme.title: The Adventures of Tintin (2011)
programme.desc: A reporter's purchase of a model ship brings him under threat from a ruthless criminal, as it is one of a series of clues to the location of the real vessel, which holds a pirate's lost treasure. He sets off on a globetrotting quest to find it, assisted by a drunken sea captain, two bumbling detectives and his faithful dog. Steven Spielberg's animated adventure based on Herge's comic-strip series, with the voices of Jamie Bell, Andy Serkis and Daniel Craig(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: Men in Black (1997)
programme.desc: A streetwise cop is enlisted by a top-secret government force dedicated to policing alien visitors to Earth, teaming up with a veteran agent just as a body-swapping extraterrestrial giant insect begins a reign of terror throughout New York City. Sci-fi comedy, starring Will Smith, Tommy Lee Jones, Linda Fiorentino, Rip Torn and Vincent D'Onofrio(n)

programme.desc: The host takes on a classic 1930s terraced home with a kitchen that's so tiny the fridge and oven have to live in another room. The two mismatched fireplaces are causing marital strife, with one of the couple loving the original 1930s one, and the other favouring the Victorian reproduction. Only one fireplace can stay in George's new art deco-inspired scheme. Plus, he revisits a Victorian home where George previously helped renovate the bottom two floors(n)

programme.title: SAS: Who Dares Wins

Those who make it through will face the most psychologically demanding phase of selection, Interrogation, where they are captured and questioned by a specialist team of military interrogators. When no evidence of wrongdoing is found, Jones is freed from custody, but the distraught father of one of the missing youngsters is not convinced of Jones' innocence, and kidnaps him in the hope of extracting a confession by force. programme.title: DHL: The World's Biggest Delivery Company
programme.desc: At one of DHL's major hubs inside East Midlands Airport, shipping companies have to deal with huge volumes of packages each day. The key is a process known as 'the sort', in which people load and unload a vast automated system of conveyor belts. In South Africa, cameras follow Hloni as he attempts to go global with his new Sowetan vodka brand. Narrated by Lewis MacLeod(n)

programme.title: Secret Scotland
programme.desc: Perthshire is known as Scotland's 'big tree country' and with its lush forest it's easy to see why. Susan goes behind the scenes with Lady Mansfield at the magnificent Scone Palace, the historical crowning site of Scotland's kings. She also explores the secrets of the Hermitage in Dunkeld, a purpose-built forest playground for the aristocracy. Then it's on to the Birnam Oak, said to have inspired the writing of Macbeth. There's a chance to learn the art of glassmaking as well as meet a colony of bees who create special honey from Scotland's heather. Susan ends her journey in the city of Dundee(n)

programme.title: Holidaying with Jane McDonald
programme.desc: The singer takes in Valletta, tiny capital of the Mediterranean island nation of Malta, by land and sea. Tommy Walsh enjoys an escorted tour of Spain, where he visits the Plaza de Espania in Seville and enjoys a horse and carriage ride round the centre. He also goes to Granada, where he visits the Alhambra and is treated to a flamenco show. Plus, Chris Bisson explores Northern Ireland's coastline, replete with waterfalls and kayaking opportunities. There's also time to absorb the centre of Belfast on a black cab tour of the city(n)

programme.title: Inside the World's Greatest Hotels
programme.desc: A look behind the scenes at the Dorchester in London's affluent area of Mayfair, which has been associated with the rich and famous since it first opened in 1931. A royal stag party is just one of the subjects covered in the programme, along with fascinating accounts of engagements, honeymoons and an untimely death(n)

programme.title: The Wonderful World of Chocolate
programme.desc: Food giant Nestlé opens the doors of its Perugia factory in Italy, where production manager Davide looks into the secrets of what is undeniably a labour of love. Chocolatier Prudence Staite has a big challenge ahead, creating a full-blown chocolate replica of a much-loved vintage motorbike for the National Motorcycle Museum in Solihull, as it celebrates its 35th birthday(n)

programme.title: The All-Inclusive: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: As their stay comes to an end, the Greens still have a few more tricks up their sleeves. The family's nifty hacks and tips for making the most of the hotel do not stop until they check out. All-inclusive newbies the Wests are also preparing to head home, but have yet to find their feet in the world of all-inclusive before the transfer arrives. There is no time to relax for the hotel's staff as they prepare for the Spanish-themed night. For Mohammed, that means a last-minute dash for some all-important ingredients. Narrated by Matthew McNulty(n)

Experiencing Nikola's new life in the woods above the village of Kokocak on the edge of Papuk Nature Park, Ben tries to understand what drove Nikola to make a sudden decision to quit everything and retire to such a forgotten corner of the world, finding a new life of purity and self-sufficiency away from mainstream society(n)

programme.title: The Three Musketeers (1973)

Comedy, starring Michael Douglas, Robert De Niro, Morgan Freeman and Kevin Kline(n)

Fantasy adventure, starring Vin Diesel, Elijah Wood, Rose Leslie and Michael Caine(n)

To complicate matters, it also transpires that Robin has developed feelings for him. Comedy, starring Josh Radnor and Cobie Smulders(n)

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

Nevertheless, he sets about rescuing them from disaster and turning around the failing business(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam and Beverly decide to create a music video to help Erica's application to Julliard stand out, but the production does not go as planned. When Murray bonds with Lainey's father Bill, he learns what it means to be a real friend. Tim Meadows and David Koechner guest star(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica is accepted into a summer arts school, but Murray struggles to express his pride in his daughter. Barry takes up the role of school sports mascot, but fails to realise that students from a rival school are planning to beat up the mascot at an upcoming game(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Lainey, Erica and Barry plan a big Risky Business-inspired party at Lainey's house while her father is out of town. programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta tries to add a touch of romance to an event when he invites his girlfriend Sophia (Eva Longoria) to the precinct's work trip, along with Amy's boyfriend, Teddy (Kyle Bornheimer). programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Doug Judy (Craig Robinson) is returned to custody after scamming Jake and Rosa in a previous encounter, but Captain Holt offers him a plea deal when he reveals he knows the location of a notorious drug dealer. programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Boyle go on an eight-day stakeout, which puts a strain on their friendship. Meanwhile, Jeffords uses Santiago and Gina for inspiration when he writes a book about his daughters, and Captain Holt's nephew visits Brooklyn and makes an instant impression on Diaz. Comedy, guest starring Kyra Sedgwick and Nick Cannon(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The team visits Boyle's beach house on a detectives-only getaway, but Peralta ruins the fun by inviting Captain Holt along. The host helps Diaz to send romantic texts to her new boyfriend Marcus, while Gina amuses herself by trying to get Santiago drunk. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta faces paying back all the money he has borrowed from his colleagues over the years, and goes to great lengths to keep a secret about Sergeant Jeffords. Santiago and Captain Holt team up to reopen the Brooklyn Broiler arson case(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Sophia's job gets in the way of her relationship with Peralta, he tries to win the favour of her boss Geoffrey (guest star Chris Parnell). Meanwhile, Deputy Chief Madeline Wuntch needs Captain Holt's help with a job recommendation(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Though still heartbroken over Sophia, Jake's spirits are lifted when the squad is invited to a Homeland Security counter-terrorism training simulation. Gina performs a psychological test on Holt, while Santiago and Diaz compete for a day off(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny starts her own hair accessories business and the orders start to pile in. However, she makes the mistake of asking Sheldon to help, leading to frustration and regret. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny feels threatened when a sexy actress, who has landed a role in TV series CSI, moves into the apartment building, and gradually begins to sense that her friends are being manipulated by the new arrival. Comedy, starring Kaley Cuoco, Valerie Azlynn, Johnny Galecki and Simon Helberg(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny catches the eye of comic-book shopkeeper Stuart, and Leonard is devastated when she gives serious consideration to dating her new admirer. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Stuart takes Penny out for a second date, during which she drunkenly reveals her true feelings. Meanwhile, Howard uncovers a flaw in the toilet he designed for a Nasa space shuttle, and asks his friends to help him correct it before the launch. Kaley Cuoco, Kevin Sussman and Simon Helberg star(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon wins a grant to pay for a summer expedition to the North Pole, and invites his friends to join him. However, the gang's imminent departure causes Leonard and Penny to reconsider their feelings for each other. Johnny Gale and Kaley Cuoco star(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon returns to Texas in disgrace when he discovers his friends tampered with the Arctic expedition data after growing tired of his quest for a scientific breakthrough. Elsewhere, Leonard becomes frustrated as constant interruptions hamper his attempts to woo Penny(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon succeeds in getting Penny to conform to his high standards, so Leonard adopts a similar strategy for his romantic gain. Meanwhile, Howard and Raj meet two women at a goth nightclub and things appear to go well - until they are taken to a tattoo parlour(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj accepts Sheldon's offer to work for him as he is desperate to avoid being sent back to India. Howard starts spending more time with Leonard and Penny, who would rather be left alone. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is given the chance to square off against the one actor from the Star Trek franchise he holds a grudge against - Wil Wheaton. Meanwhile, Leonard asks Penny to set Howard up on a date with one of her friends. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard worries his lack of American football knowledge is alienating him from Penny and her friends. Meanwhile, Raj is infuriated when Howard abandons him to pursue a girl at a kite-fighting contest(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay - Part 2 (2015)
programme.desc: The civilisation of Panem is consumed by a bloody civil war. Conclusion of the sci-fi adventure series based on Suzanne Collins' novels, starring Jennifer Lawrence, Donald Sutherland and Philip Seymour Hoffman in his final role(n)

Animated adventure, with the voices of Amanda Seyfried, Josh Hutcherson, Colin Farrell and Christoph Waltz(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry accidentally records over one of Beverly's prized family videotapes - her treasured keepsake from his fifth birthday party. Meanwhile, Adam and Murray build a robot together, but the project comes between them when they experience creative differences(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam goes to great lengths to dodge swimming classes, but his plan to avoid the sport could affect his friendship with Dave. Jealousy prompts Barry to undermine Erica when she attempts to make the world a better place by forming a school social awareness club(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Peralta notices Holt is in a bad mood, he teams up with the captain's husband Kevin to find out what has gone wrong. Boyle tries to get a confession out of an elderly bank-robbery suspect (played by Happy Days creator Garry Marshall), who pretends to be frail and adorable whenever Santiago and Diaz are around(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake's seldom-seen father Roger arrives to spend some time with his son, but Charles is sceptical of his true motives. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dani Harmer is the next to host, but having never chopped an onion before, let alone thrown a dinner party, it proves to be a night of firsts for the Tracy Beaker star(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

Mark is out to impress Love Island champion Jack Fincham, CBBC star Dani Harmer, boy band member Abz from Five and Pants on Fire comedy duo Donna and Veron(n)

programme.title: Night at the Museum (2006)
programme.desc: A new nightwatchman at New York's Museum of Natural History discovers his job entails more than he bargained for. Once night falls, an ancient Egyptian spell brings the museum exhibits to life, entangling him in a riotous struggle to restore peace and order before the sun rises and visitors arrive. Fantasy comedy, starring Ben Stiller, Dick Van Dyke, Robin Williams, Carla Gugino and Ricky Gervais(n)

programme.title: Star Trek: Discovery

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Newly-weds Karen and John Leonard from Essex are about to retire. With the last of the six boys they have between them about to leave home, they're looking for a new adventure and a complete change of lifestyle. Scarlette Douglas shows them five properties in the sunny south of Gran Canaria for their budget of £175,000(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Michelle and Gary Cole from Birmingham have both suffered from ill health over the past few years and have decided that the rejuvenating effects of the Spanish sun are just what the doctor ordered. They're looking for a holiday home where they and their two kids can spend quality time together. Laura Hamilton shows them five properties on the Costa Blanca for their £65,000 budget(n)

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig present the 2018 grand final, as the three remaining bakers compete to impress judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith and take home the trophy. For the final three challenges, they must prepare and decorate doughnuts, followed by a deceptively simple technical, and climaxing with an intricate, multi-layered, edible landscape showstopper(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Max McMurdo travel the length of Britain seeking items to fix up, flog on and sell for profit. Max upcycles a brass propeller into a stylish table lamp, while Henry goes all Victorian with an old pond yacht(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel Britain looking for items to fix up and flog on behalf of their owners. In this episode they're close to the Malvern Hills. Henry picks two saddles from horse owner Sabrina and converts them into bar stools, while Simon makes a handsome profit on a 1960s kitchen cupboard(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Simon White and Shirley Boyle, owners of the Old Hall Country House in Madeley, Cheshire, host the week's first round of the B&B competition. The guests are impressed by the 16th-century building, and are taken tap-dancing and to a private fine-dining restaurant, but one of them is dissatisfied with her bedroom's layout and the garnish on her eggs at breakfast(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Eileen Finn invites her fellow contestants to the four-star Thornley House in Allendale, Northumberland, for the second round of the contest, but struggles to follow the impressive first event. The hostess's pet cats are not to all of her guests' liking, and with activities including a tour of a feline cemetery, the theme for the stay is made abundantly clear(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jessica and Adrian Rashleigh are the third hosts, at their three-bedroom establishment Chy Conyn in St Ives, Cornwall. For the activity they arrange a magical mystery camper van tour of the local sights. Some of the guests struggle with the small breakfast room but the food is a success, and Eileen Finn demonstrates her karate skills on the men(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay is at the Cavendish in Bournemouth, run by Tim and Karen Sturgess. On arrival, the competitors are impressed by the 'pink palace', but things go downhill when a bed is broken and one couple are allocated a room next to the front door. However, Eileen is delighted by the feline memorabilia in her room and the group enjoys a spot of indoor paint-balling and an open-top bus tour of the resort(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Simon White of Old Hall Country House is surprised by an overpayment and Eileen Finn from the four-star Thornley receives tough criticism, before the winner is announced(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Black rhino Kitani is due to give birth at Chester Zoo and help swell the ranks of this endangered species, but, having lost three previous calves, it is a worrying time and the keepers are concerned that things aren't going to plan. The zoo also has four rare new arrivals called tenrecs, mysterious mammals from Madagascar and, with so little known about them, the keepers try everything they can to help them breed, while red river hog Mali has given birth to twins, but tearaway dad Confetti is a threat to his own babies(n)

programme.title: Love It or List It Australia
programme.desc: Lyndi and Les love where they live and the life they have with their three children in the Adelaide suburb of Frewville. But Les has fallen out of love with their house and feels they have outgrown it. Andrew Winter wants to introduce them to the idea of a move, but Neale Whitaker has some great design ideas to reignite their passion for their current home(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Presenter Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend head to South Yorkshire to plan to surprise the daughter of an amateur off-road champion by restoring her late mother's Series 1 Land Rover(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree await the arrival of their guests, who are expecting a luxurious Christmas at the chateau. Dick continues work on installing the lift, but the project tests his ingenuity to the limit, while Angel finds more valuables in the attic, including a collection of vinyl records(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A woman is transferred to St George's after crashing her car into a tree, and has to have her broken ankle very quickly realigned if she is to have any hope of walking again. A man who collapsed suddenly is suspected of having a life-threatening head injury, while a four-year-old girl needs treatment after falling on an escalator(n)

programme.title: The Passenger
programme.desc: In Marseille, Mathias is looking for his true identity among the homeless people who know him as Victor Janusz. While there, he discovers a previous murder related to the Greek myth of Icarus. Anais follows Mathias to Marseille and is hot on his heels with the help of Captain Crosnier. Meanwhile, a clandestine meeting regarding a major manipulation of stock prices puts pressure on Anais's father, who has a dark past of his own. Is there a link between the murders and the stock market negotiation? In French. Jean-Hugues Anglade stars. In French(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 92-year-old man may have a bleed on the brain after falling and hitting his head, so is sent for a CT scan. Two patients who came to the UK from Iran are brought in - one suffering from chest pains, the other having difficulty speaking. They and their friends and family share their memories of the revolution and how it affected their lives(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the words-and-numbers quiz, as Jon Richardson and David O'Doherty take on guest captain Johnny Vegas and Jamie Laing. Holly Walsh joins Countdown's resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner and Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Yanni's in Seattle, where he clashes with defiant owner Peter Avgoustiou, a chef so set in his ways that he hasn't allowed any changes to his menu since the Greek restaurant opened in 1984. Peter's family is concerned the business is becoming trapped in the past, and standards are slipping, but he seems determined to stick to his guns(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A woman is transferred to St George's after crashing her car into a tree, and has to have her broken ankle very quickly realigned if she is to have any hope of walking again. A man who collapsed suddenly is suspected of having a life-threatening head injury, while a four-year-old girl needs treatment after falling on an escalator(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty heads to the Spanish city of Seville to look for the mysterious ingredient that gives marmalade its bitter tang, while Kate Quilton meets an entrepreneur who has developed an ecosystem that could revolutionise the future of fish farming. Matt Tebbutt hits the streets to see how billy goat meat goes down with the British public(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Anne Hogarth first fell in love with Lanzarote over a decade ago and now, after several visits to the island since, is looking for a holiday home to enjoy in her retirement. With her daughter Rachel along for moral support, Jonnie Irwin shows Anne five properties in the resort of Puerto del Carmen for her £85,000 budget(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Although she's approaching retirement age, Karmen Meredith is in no mood to slow down. Instead, the Derbyshire woman is looking for a bolthole on Spain's Costa del Sol, so Danni Menzies shows her five properties to choose between(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Patrick and Corrine Duly from East Sussex first visited Lanzarote four years ago. They immediately fell in love with the island, and now that they've retired they're looking for a holiday home where they can escape to and spend more active winters in the sun. With a budget of £140,000, Scarlette Douglas shows them five properties in the south of the island(n)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: The experts are in Manchester, where house prices have been known to rise faster than anywhere else in the UK, including London. Kirstie Allsopp is with Katherine and Andrew, who are looking for a property they can renovate into their dream home. They have £185,000 to spend - but money isn't Kirstie's biggest challenge this week - she's facing competition from developers and needs the couple to decide quickly when they see the place they want. Phil Spencer scours the southern suburbs for Sarah and Claude, who have their hearts set on desirable Didsbury. They desperately need more space as Claude's one-bedroom bachelor pad is bursting at the seams, but with their sights set on one of the most expensive areas in the city, Phil has to open their eyes to what their £250,000 budget can buy them in other locations(n)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: The property experts visit south London, as Phil Spencer helps childhood sweethearts Cleo and Ben find a home together in Brixton on a budget of £500,000. Meanwhile, Kirstie Allsopp meets first-time buyer Charli, who wants to get her foot on the property ladder in and around Croydon, with £280,000 to spend(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Documentary following Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree through the process of buying and restoring a French chateau that has been empty for the past four decades. Their new home has 12 acres of land, nine outbuildings, a walled garden and a moat - but it also has no electricity, heating or water, and proves to be a far more complicated DIY project than expected(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick and Angel decide they will live as self-sufficiently as they can while restoring the chateau, and invest in some chickens to provide them with eggs for breakfast every morning. However, they still have countless problems to deal with, and have only £20,000 left to spend on the project. The chateau is still without either heating or water, while the 59 windows are crumbling. While Dick's renovations fall behind schedule, Angel is in her element coming up with ideas for what the finished building will look like(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree only have a few weeks to prepare for their wedding, but the chateau is nowhere near ready to receive the 200 guests they have invited and finding reliable, affordable workers is proving difficult. Dick oversees the damming of the moat and the installation of a new, eco-friendly sewage system, while Angel turns her attention to giving the rooms a distinctive decor(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: This competition takes place in and around Aberdeen, where 32-year-old offshore logistics supervisor Michelle, hopes to win over her guests with her 'Weegie' wit and prove that Glaswegians have more fun. The guests she's out to impress are 46-year-old year farmer Turid, 30-year-old comedy promoter Naz, 28-year-old gas and oil purchasing specialist Sylvian and 21-year-old economics student David. After a tagine with a Glaswegian twist and the mother of all balloon games, what more can she possibly do to charm her guests?(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Confident economics undergraduate David is next to host in Aberdeen, but will his student grub earn him 10 out of 10 with his guests? The 1920s Gatsby-themed dress code goes down a storm with almost everyone, on a night featuring food ending up on the floor, smoke alarms going off and some entertaining cocktail-making(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Oil and gas purchasing specialist Sylvian hosts the third dinner party in Aberdeen, hoping her attention to detail and an ambitious global themed menu will be enough to impress her guests. Philippines-born Sylvian's dishes are an East-meets-West affair, starting with Japanese gyoza, followed by a Sumatran rendang and ending with a very British sticky toffee pudding. But dessert turns out to be sticky in more ways than one; cue tears before bedtime from the host(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Aberdeen, it's the turn of comedy promoter Naz to host. If Naz is to stand a chance of winning the competition, he must find a way to placate his guests, nearly all of whom he has managed to offend over the week. Naz is, by his own admission, not the greatest cook and things don't go according to plan and much of his food is burned and difficult to chew. Ever the eternal optimist however, Naz thinks that his humour and conviviality will win over his critics and earn him the grand(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final night of the competition in Aberdeen finds journalist Turid hoping her home-grown produce will tantalise her guests' taste buds. Can Turid knock Sylvian off the top spot and walk away with the £1,000 prize?(n)

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedic Rob and technician Mike rush to a 21-month-old baby who has fallen unconscious in Kidderminster, while two men collapse in a pub in Coventry(n)

programme.title: Three Identical Strangers (2018)
programme.desc: Documentary telling the astonishing true story of three men - Robert Shafran, Edward Galland and David Kellman - who made the chance discovery at the age of 19 that they were identical triplets, who were separated at birth and adopted by three different sets of parents within a 100-mile radius of each other in New York State. The trio's joyous reunion catapults them to fame and they became instant media sensations - opening an A-list New York restaurant and even appearing in a movie with Madonna. But the brothers' discovery also sets in motion a chain of events that unearths an extraordinary and disturbing secret that goes far beyond their own lives(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 75-year-old man who fell out of bed is suspected of having a stroke, and doctors have only a short window of time to administer a life-saving, clot-busting drug. A mother of two falls off her horse, and a six-year-old girl has a possible neck injury after an accident in the playground. Family members of the patients share their personal stories(n)

programme.title: Father Ted

However, they immediately get on the wrong side of their fellow holiday-makers, and matters become even more dire when Father Noel Furlong turns up - with his hapless youth group in tow. Comedy, guest starring Graham Norton(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The priests organise a raffle to raise funds to repair their leaky roof, planning to award a car as the prize. Unfortunately, Ted accidentally wrecks it before the grand draw takes place, and embarks on a frantic search for a replacement. Dermot Morgan and Ardal O'Hanlon play the Craggy Island clerics(n)

programme.title: It Was Alright In

With contributions by Chris Tarrant, Matt Forde, Jenny Eclair, Samira Ahmed and Philippa Perry(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

Distracted from the task of improving her menu by performing for customers, she's oblivious to the disastrous dishes being served from her own kitchen(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Jack, Dougal and Ted head off for a summer break at a caravan park. However, they immediately get on the wrong side of their fellow holiday-makers, and matters become even more dire when Father Noel Furlong turns up - with his hapless youth group in tow. Comedy, guest starring Graham Norton(n)

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces

On his Italian road trip, George discovers a spectacular house made almost entirely out of glass near Lake Lugano, and at the wilderness retreat, he and Will struggle to get the walls right(n)

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: Award-winning architect Jo Cowen, who has worked on projects including the British Museum and the JP Morgan tower at Canary Wharf, is called in to help Croydon couple Denise and Ali breathe new life into their uninspiring council house. She plans a striking glazed extension, and comes up with a further idea for the upstairs that requires an extra £40,000 on top of the not inconsiderable £120,000 budget. But problems begin to appear, pushing the couple to the brink(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

However, when Yuno shakes his booty on the dance floor, opera-loving Nick is unimpressed and flirty Michelle lets her hands do the talking(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree continue their renovation of a French chateau, 18 months after the end of the first series. So far, only nine rooms have been renovated and many areas of the 12-acre estate have yet to be looked at - but the project is going to have to start paying for itself soon. They make plans to host weddings on the grounds, while looking ahead to keeping livestock and growing their own crops. Dick takes steps to generate solar power during a hot summer, and turns an old oil tank into a pig roaster(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau

programme.desc: Documentary examining what caused Pierre Levegh's Mercedes to crash into the crowd during the 1955 Le Mans 24-hour race, killing more than 80 people - an accident that remains the worst in the history of motor racing. Among the theories discussed are the use of untested technologies by the car's manufacturers, the addition of a lethal fuel additive and allegations of reckless driving by future Formula One world champion Mike Hawthorn, who won the race with Jaguar team partner Ivor Bueb. Narrated by Jack Deam(n)

programme.title: Prince Philip: The Plot to Make a King
programme.desc: Secret History documentary telling the inside story of the dynastic tensions that were unleashed when Princess Elizabeth, the future queen, fell in love with Prince Philip. It was felt that Philip was rough and ill-mannered - and with the Second World War still fresh in most people's minds, the royal and political elite disliked his German roots. But following the death of King George VI in 1952, the establishment feared a dynastic coup, with the Queen torn between the two sides. The documentary examines the complexities and frustrations of the royal marriage, as the monarch struggled to reconcile the love of her husband with the suspicions of her family and her government(n)

programme.title: Farage: The Man Who Made Brexit
programme.desc: Filmed over five months, this documentary explores the world of the British politician Nigel Farage as he attempts to build on his historic success in May 2019's European elections. This documentary captures the inside story of Farage's doomed attempt to persuade Boris Johnson to join a Leavers' Alliance with him, and also charts Farage's influence in changing British politics in the wake of the 2016 EU referendum. With racism returning to haunt the party and plummeting poll ratings, is December 2019's general election the event that finally persuades Farage that the UK will never buy what he is selling? Or can he claim victory with a brand-new right-leaning Tory government that supports much of what he stands for?(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Despite now living with Lindsey, Alan hooks up with an ex-girlfriend, prompting his eternally put-upon brother to pick at his conscience. However, an accident involving a discarded pipe places Charlie at the mercy of his sibling once again. Comedy, starring Charlie Sheen(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Rose makes one of her dramatic balcony entrances, interrupting Charlie's romantic evening with Michelle. She proceeds to reveal that she is about to get married, prompting Alan and his long-suffering brother to crash the event. However, things are not quite what they seem(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart and Iain head to Manchester, where a landlord is owed £8,000 in rent arrears and has already called for police back-up. As tempers rise, the pair must find a way to handle a situation that is spiralling dangerously out of control. Meanwhile, Brian and Del chase £3,000 owed to a firm of letting agents, before tracking a debtor who was accidentally over-paid for a job. Plus, Stewart and Iain face an eviction that is set to test their patience(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Ben face a challenging eviction in London, where a vulnerable tenant in rent arrears has barricaded her front door, and the agents receive a tirade of abuse. Meanwhile, Brian and Del chase a debt of nearly £2,000 in Surrey, before trying to recover almost £3,000 in Northamptonshire. Finally, Steve and Ru head to Portsmouth to evict a young family for a landlord who wants her property back(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement agents Paul Bohill and Steve Pinner are in Birmingham on a potentially dangerous, full-scale eviction of a large traveller community. Meanwhile, in London's diamond district Brian O'Shaughnessy and Delroy Anglin are chasing nearly £6,000 owed by a jeweller to an unhappy customer, although a solicitor tries to convince Delroy his client owes nothing(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: One-off edition in which the High Court enforcement agents are caught in the crossfire of three bitter family disputes, including a debt-dodging man who pushes his panic-stricken mother over the edge. Plus, a family booted onto the streets at night by a ruthless aunt, and a man who won't engage with the agents and loses his car(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: In Bristol, eviction lawyer Chris deals with a complex case in which squatters have broken into an empty pub and are now refusing to leave, with landlord Alex wanting them out as he is awaiting planning permission to turn the pub into flats. Jill is trying to regain a property she and her late husband bought as an investment, which she has been renting out to alleviate financial stress(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Harrow Council carries out early morning raids on several dangerous properties, only to find vulnerable tenants in uninhabitable conditions, including one man living in a plywood shed on a roof. Plus, two more cases of nightmare tenants. Nisha lost her job just as her tenants stopped paying the rent, while Andy agreed to rent his north London home to a friend - who ended up subletting the house and pocketing the profits for himself(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A young mum locked out of her home by the young couple she allowed to stay there for free while the wife had a baby. Plus, an east London landlord who found half a dozen strangers living in his house, after his original tenant had run off and sublet the property. Meanwhile, Harrow Council raid a small two-bedroom flat in unsafe conditions(n)

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine traumatic, shocking, humorous and occasionally bizarre experiences of people who have become involved in disputes with neighbours. The programme also reveals how long-fought battles result in Asbos, evictions and sometimes violence(n)

Learning that a former US bobsleigh coach is living nearby, he seizes the chance to shine in an entirely different sport, and cajoles three of his friends to join him in training for the 1988 Winter Olympics in the far less tropical environment of Canada. Fact-based comedy, with John Candy, Leon, Doug E Doug and Malik Yoba(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac suspects he could be next on a killer's list of targets after learning two men who share his name have been murdered, and sets about rounding up his other namesakes for questioning. programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: Angie and Shade search for a missing youngster who has been drawn into a dangerous situation while trying to become famous(n)

programme.desc: The admissions director of an exclusive Manhattan elementary school is bludgeoned to death and Briscoe and Green initially believe she was murdered by a parent determined to have their child enrolled. However, as their investigation continues, a member of the school's staff comes under suspicion. Guest starring Roger Rees, with Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A private investigator's murder draws Briscoe and Green toward a case of corruption in a baseball league - where the manager will do anything to ensure his team wins. They learn the victim had unearthed a scandal in which an ineligible player was being fielded in every game - and his discovery may have led to his death. Detective drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The wife of a zealous defence lawyer is found dead in her car, but Briscoe and Green suspect the victim's husband was the real target, and set off on the trail of a former client - a convict who sent him threatening letters from jail. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Steven Hill(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica agrees to help a friend with a political campaign to become a senatorial candidate. When the publicity manager is murdered, she finds herself caught up in an intriguing murder investigation. Angela Lansbury stars as the amateur sleuth(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica unwittingly gets involved in a contract killing, leading her to be accused of being the assassin and jailed. The incarcerated detective must rely on Grady and Michael to prove her innocence. With guest stars John Rhys-Davies and Michael Horton(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green are assigned to investigate the execution-style killing of a prominent businessman, and discover his wife was having an affair. However, further evidence emerges, suggesting a different motive - and an unlikely conspirator. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green look into the shooting of defence lawyer Vance Grodie, who had just won an acquittal for a suspected cop killer. Their investigations reveal a link to a network of conservative extremists, and the discovery leads the case into an examination of civil rights. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A petty officer is killed by a stolen surveillance drone and the team links it to elusive terrorist Benham Parsa. NCIS joins forces with the Department of Defence to track down the device before it is used for a large-scale attack, but Gibbs is less than pleased that he has to work with his ex-lover Hollis Mann. Meanwhile, McGee hopes he will be granted time off to attend a black-tie gala honouring his girlfriend Delilah. Guest starring Susanna Thompson (Arrow)(n)

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: Maz's sister needs Angie's help in recovering a creature that has gone missing from an aquarium. Drama, starring Jason Priestley and Cindy Sampson(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team searches for a Jack the Ripper-type killer. They believe they have found their man when DNA evidence from a murdered prostitute leads them to a registered sex offender - but while Stabler and Benson are questioning the suspect, a second murder is discovered, putting the detectives back to square one. Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay star(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A policeman's past comes back to haunt him when his wife alleges he raped her. As inquiries into the case deepen, a history of violence is exposed. Cragen is shocked by Jeffries' reaction when she is unceremoniously demoted for inappropriate conduct. Hard-hitting drama, guest starring Nestor Serrano and Amy Carlson, with Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman is attacked at a hotel's opening ceremony, and the detectives are aghast when the owners of the family-run venture try to keep the incident quiet for fear of bad publicity - but everything is not quite as it seems. Meanwhile, Benson receives devastating news. Gritty drama, starring Christopher Meloni(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team tries to help a seriously injured and traumatised woman remember the events that led to the fatal shooting of her street dancer boyfriend in their hotel room. Mac pursues a lead suggesting the victim was killed by a rival artist - but Hawkes makes a breakthrough in the lab that indicates he was targeted by someone he should have been able to trust. Gary Sinise stars(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A man falls from a bridge in what appears to be a straightforward suicide, but lab results reveal he was shot in the chest before being thrown off. Hawkes dives into the Hudson River to search for the murder weapon, and discovers an antique that reveals the 'Compass killer' has returned and claimed his third victim. Crime drama, starring Hill Harper(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and the team uncover the lair of serial murderer the 'Compass Killer' while investigating how he escaped from the World's Fair site in Queens. Stella learns he is targeting people whom he imagines could have been responsible for his wife's death, and the case becomes a race against time to find out who will be the fourth victim. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A famous, but ailing, playwright tempts fate by proposing to Jessica - and almost immediately finds himself charged with murdering his business manager. Starring Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A priest and government agents using a safe house get Jessica involved in a complicated case, in which she hears the confession of a dying assassin who is connected to a recent murder. Angela Lansbury stars(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman's 75th birthday party is interrupted by a sudden death, presenting Jessica with yet another baffling mystery to solve. Starring Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Cabot Cove becomes the scene of deadly competition when an eccentric recluse dies, and Jessica is given the dubious honour of executing the woman's will. Starring Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: After investing in an upmarket seafood restaurant in New York, Jessica soon finds herself investigating the murder of one of the employees. Starring Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates a mysterious death, the repercussions of which are causing unrest among the riders at a rodeo. Starring Angela Lansbury, Kristy McNichol and Larry Wilcox(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: One of Jessica's former students brings a play based on one of her novels to Broadway, only for the sleuth find herself in the middle of a war of words between rival theatre critics - and then for one of them to turn up dead. Angela Lansbury stars, with Dean Stockwell and Eugene Roche(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Blueprint for Murder (1972)
programme.desc: An architect kills his business partner, and comes up with an elaborate scheme to make Columbo first suspect him, then reject him as the murderer. The villain begins by teasing the detective with hints on where he has hidden the body - hoping that when Columbo fails to find a corpse, he will look elsewhere for a killer. Crime drama, directed by and starring Peter Falk. With Patrick O'Neal and Janis Paige(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Petty officer Jody Ray is killed by a hit-and-run driver and evidence points to staff sergeant Justin Dunne, whose guilt seems certain when DiNozzo and McGee find him washing a bloodstained knife when they go to arrest him. However, Dunne tells his lawyer Carrie Clark he was miles away in Falls Church at the time - stabbing bookmaker Donny Sullivan to death. Unable to reveal the truth to the NCIS team, Clark decides to check out the alibi herself. Crime drama, guest starring Salli Richardson-Whitfield (A Town Called Eureka)(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An internal security breach forces NCIS to go into lockdown when a covert listening device is found in a pen belonging to Secretary of the Navy Sarah Porter. DiNozzo discovers that National Security Agency analyst Ellie Bishop wrote a report two years previously predicting the possibility of such an occurrence and she is brought in to assist with the investigation and track down the culprit. Guest starring Leslie Hope and Emily Wickersham(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is called in to investigate when marine corporal Flegman is found shot to death, and a phone leads them to a hotel room where Gibbs awkwardly stumbles upon his ex-wife Diane Sterling and her FBI agent ex-husband TC Fornell. She had been attempting to call her boyfriend Eddie to break up with him, but somehow Flegman had taken possession of his phone. The team tracks down Eddie's car and discovers a clown nose along with traces of blood and he quickly becomes the prime suspect(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A man accused of the sexual abuse of his daughter is subsequently murdered, but laying the blame at the door of the chief suspects proves difficult. Several family members are in the frame, but despite evidence of a gun outside the victim's office, they appear to be innocent(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team investigates the ritualistic murder of a boy, a woman and an elderly man, and finds they all figured in sexual abuse cases investigated by Benson. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and Benson investigate the death of a world-famous singer's son, and soon begin to suspect that parental neglect may have been a factor in the case - leading them to fear for the victim's younger sister. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An exceptional teacher who helped inner-city kids get into college is murdered, but Stabler and Benson's investigation reveals her sinister double life as a sex addict - which has made her plenty of enemies. Meanwhile, Munch and Tutuola discover her sordid relationship with a married doctor. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team responds to an emergency call from a luxury penthouse, and arrives to find a mummified corpse in the living room. programme.title: CSI: NY

The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella is convinced that a woman's apparent suicide is a cover-up for murder, ending a three-year quest to trace her missing twin brother. The detective hurries to compile enough evidence to prove her instincts right and is nearly killed by the victim's stepfather - but with the culprit in custody, she hopes to find out more about the long-lost sibling. Crime drama, starring Melina Kanakaredes and Robert Joy(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica agrees to help a friend with a political campaign to become a senatorial candidate. When the publicity manager is murdered, she finds herself caught up in an intriguing murder investigation. Angela Lansbury stars as the amateur sleuth(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica unwittingly gets involved in a contract killing, leading her to be accused of being the assassin and jailed. The incarcerated detective must rely on Grady and Michael to prove her innocence. With guest stars John Rhys-Davies and Michael Horton(n)

programme.title: Columbo: A Trace of Murder (1997)
programme.desc: A conniving woman yearns to divorce her husband and set up home with her lover - but a pre-nuptial agreement means she stands to lose out. Instead, she devises a cunning plan to nullify the contract, framing her unsuspecting spouse for the murder of a business rival. However, she reckons without the shabby sleuth's unfailing ability to uncover the truth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Shera Danese, Barry Corbin and David Rasche(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Blueprint for Murder (1972)
programme.desc: An architect kills his business partner, and comes up with an elaborate scheme to make Columbo first suspect him, then reject him as the murderer. The villain begins by teasing the detective with hints on where he has hidden the body - hoping that when Columbo fails to find a corpse, he will look elsewhere for a killer. Crime drama, directed by and starring Peter Falk. With Patrick O'Neal and Janis Paige(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Murder with Too Many Notes (2000)
programme.desc: Oscar-winning composer Findlay Crawford relies on his assistant Gabriel to do all the hard work, but the younger musician demands recognition. To protect his reputation, Findlay kills Gabriel with a time-delayed drug to give himself the perfect alibi - but the slovenly sleuth sees through his ruse. Detective drama, with Peter Falk and Billy Connolly(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Old Fashioned Murder (1976)
programme.desc: A woman who has devoted her life to running her family's museum is outraged when her brother decides to sell it. Knowing of someone with criminal connections, she arranges to have her brother killed. However, just when she starts to think she has got away with it, a certain shabby sleuth is assigned to the case. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Joyce Van Patten, Celeste Holm and Tim O'Connor(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates when a mysterious, fast-spreading illness strikes children from military families. While Gibbs tries to determine the cause, Abby and Jimmy partner with the Naval Medical Research Centre in the hope of delivering a cure before the holidays. Mark Harmon stars(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A petty officer is killed by a stolen surveillance drone and the team links it to elusive terrorist Benham Parsa. NCIS joins forces with the Department of Defence to track down the device before it is used for a large-scale attack, but Gibbs is less than pleased that he has to work with his ex-lover Hollis Mann. Meanwhile, McGee hopes he will be granted time off to attend a black-tie gala honouring his girlfriend Delilah. Guest starring Susanna Thompson (Arrow)(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Detectives Logan and Wheeler investigate when a popular online video blogger is apparently kidnapped during a live broadcast, but begin to doubt the crime really occurred. However, the case takes a strange turn when a ransom demand is made. Michelle Trachtenberg guest stars, and veteran US news reporter Larry King appears as himself(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The kidnapping of a baby at a grocery store leads the detectives to a shady racket that involves snatching infants and arranging to sell them for adoption. Unexpectedly, the investigation produces new leads on an old case involving a murdered mother and her missing child - which had been supervised by Cragen and his partner. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An HIV-positive man with a record of assaulting under-age girls is suspected of a series of rapes and murders - but Stabler's determination to charge him results in tragedy. Undeterred, the team pursues its new suspect, a rap promoter, though his cunning leaves little hope of a conviction. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek(n)

programme.title: Rewind
programme.desc: Ten years ago, in November 2006, Al Jazeera English was launched. To mark that anniversary, we've created a new show, REWIND, which over the coming weeks will let us re-screen and update some of the channel's most memorable and award-winning documentaries of the past decade. Filmed against the dramatic backdrop of Doha's iconic Museum of Islamic Art, our team will be finding out what happened to some of the characters in those programmes and asking how their stories have changed in the years since our cameras left(n)

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner(n)

programme.title: All Star Family Fortunes

Vernon Kay hosts(n)

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds.
